field_values.action_summary: Amidst the skirmish, Carter discovers Powell's body, killed by arrows. Devastated, Carter retrieves the body and attempts to flee from the pursuing warriors.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups of Carter's reaction to Powell; Medium shots of the struggle to move the body; Tracking shots of the flight/pursuit
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Arrow placement on james_k_powell must remain static
Injury level on john_carter must be consistent during physical exertion
Proximity distance of apache_warriors to Carter
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the immediate aftermath of a skirmish through the discovery of a fallen comrade, driving the protagonist from grief into a high-stakes physical escape.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- james_k_powell (Deceased)
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- apache_plateau_camp (Ambush site/trail area)

## Continuity Constraints
- Arrow placement on james_k_powell must remain static.
- Injury level on john_carter must be consistent during physical exertion.
- Proximity distance of apache_warriors to Carter.

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of Powell's body (Horror/Grief).
- BT002: Retrieval of the body (Physical struggle).
- BT003: The escape flight (Desperation/Urgency).
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
